description: Test vectors for participant_step1(hostseckey, params, random).
Executes the first round of DKG from a participant's perspective.
Takes the participant's host secret key, session parameters, and 32 bytes of fresh randomness.
Returns an opaque state object and a participant message (pmsg1) to send to the coordinator.
Verify the returned pmsg1 equals expectedPmsg1.
Verify it raises an exception matching expectedError.

errorTestCases.comment: length of host secret key is not 32 bytes
host secret key is zero
host secret key is out of range
invalid threshold value
threshold exceeds the number of participants
hostpubkeys list contains an invalid value with invalid prefix
hostpubkeys list contains an invalid value with invalid x-coordinate
hostpubkeys list contains an infinity point
hostpubkeys list contains duplicate values

expectedError.message: Host secret key does not match any host public key
